name: CBS Corporation
description: Paramount Global, formerly known as CBS Corporation and ViacomCBS, is a leading American multinational media and entertainment conglomerate. The company operates a vast portfolio of iconic brands, including the CBS Television Network, Paramount Pictures, MTV, Nickelodeon, and BET. Through its diverse assets, Paramount produces and distributes premium content across broadcast, cable, and digital platforms, including its direct-to-consumer streaming service, Paramount+. Headquartered in the United States, the company remains a dominant force in global media, delivering news, sports, and entertainment to audiences worldwide while continuously evolving its digital streaming capabilities to shape the future of the industry.
